# Typography

## Overview

BrainSAIT's typography system ensures clear, professional communication across all platforms.

---

## Font Families

### Primary Font (English)
**Inter**
- Clean, modern sans-serif
- Excellent screen readability
- Wide range of weights

### Primary Font (Arabic)
**IBM Plex Sans Arabic**
- Designed for Arabic
- Matches Inter aesthetics
- Bilingual harmony

---

## Type Scale

| Name | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage |
|------|------|--------|-------------|-------|
| Display | 48px | 700 | 1.1 | Hero headlines |
| H1 | 36px | 700 | 1.2 | Page titles |
| H2 | 28px | 600 | 1.3 | Section headers |
| H3 | 22px | 600 | 1.4 | Subsections |
| H4 | 18px | 600 | 1.4 | Card titles |
| Body | 16px | 400 | 1.6 | Paragraphs |
| Small | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | Captions |
| Tiny | 12px | 400 | 1.4 | Labels |

---

## Font Weights

- **400 (Regular)** - Body text
- **500 (Medium)** - UI elements
- **600 (Semi-bold)** - Subheadings
- **700 (Bold)** - Headings

---

## Code Typography

**Font:** JetBrains Mono
- Monospace for code
- Clear differentiation
- Good ligatures

---

## Guidelines

### Hierarchy
- Clear visual hierarchy
- Consistent sizing
- Purposeful emphasis

### Readability
- Adequate line height
- Reasonable line length (60-80 char)
- Proper contrast

### Bilingual
- Match Arabic/English sizes
- Consistent alignment
- Proper RTL support

---
